deferred_items.description: Provides specific guidance for steaming and handling plant-based alternative milks — primarily oat, soy, almond, and coconut — which behave differently from dairy milk under steam and require adjusted techniques, temperatures, and brand awareness to produce consistently good results.
deferred_items.title: Alternative Milk Handling

deferred_items.description: Establishes standards for visual drink presentation through latte art, ensuring every milk-based drink is served with intentional, clean, and consistent artwork. This block covers the fundamental pouring techniques, presentation standards for different cup sizes, and the role of visual quality in customer perception and brand identity.
deferred_items.title: Latte Art & Presentation

deferred_items.description: Establishes standards for visual drink presentation through latte art, ensuring every milk-based drink is served with intentional, clean, and consistent artwork. This block covers the fundamental pouring techniques, presentation standards for different cup sizes, and the role of visual quality in customer perception and brand identity.
deferred_items.title: Latte Art & Presentation

deferred_items.description: Integrates milk steaming technique (B043), alternative milk handling (B044), and latte art (B045) into a comprehensive milk craft mastery programme that develops advanced skills, builds team capability, and positions milk quality as a defining feature of the cafe's identity.
deferred_items.title: Milk Craft Mastery Programme

constraint_report.triage_message: This venue activated 9 items, but a team of 3 can realistically absorb ~4 concurrent changes (focused mode). The plan has been trimmed to 4 highest-priority items. 5 items deferred to a future phase.

Follow-up · 2026-03-22 · OIS 3.6
raw_input_text: Went there yesterday, roughly at 10am so things look pretty good. i saw some real efficiency improvements in general, looks like they reorganised the setup both at the counter and at the espresso machine. seems lik staff is a little happier, there was a feeling of harmony and they lookied like they are coming from the same shelf.

extraction_summary.changes_since_last: Two positive directional signals observed: (1) physical reorganisation of counter and espresso station suggesting workflow improvement, likely addressing previous bottleneck or layout inefficiency; (2) team morale and cohesion visibly improved, suggesting some cultural or interpersonal progress. However, the visit note is too brief and impressionistic to confirm resolution of any specific previously flagged signals. No signals can be formally closed on this evidence alone. A structured follow-up with specific signal checks is strongly recommended.
coverage_gaps: No signal-level evidence provided — observation is impressionistic only, no specific operational details
Visit was at 10am — morning rush (7–10am) transition not captured; no data on peak performance
No coffee or product quality observations made
No customer experience detail — queue times, order accuracy, greeting
No comparison against specific signals flagged in previous assessment
No information on whether previously identified issues have been actioned or remain open
Team size of 3 in a distressed venue — no observation on staffing adequacy for the visit time
No mention of any specific changes implemented since last visit beyond physical layout

unmapped_observations.evidence: they reorganised the setup both at the counter and at the espresso machine
unmapped_observations.observation: Counter and espresso station layout has been reorganised, with visible efficiency improvements noted by observer

unmapped_observations.evidence: staff is a little happier, there was a feeling of harmony and they looked like they are coming from the same shelf
unmapped_observations.observation: Team morale and cohesion appears improved since previous assessment — staff observed as happier and more aligned
